What we're gonna do so Steven and I are gonna be kind of tagging some things back and forth So some things that he's better teaching he likes more and has taught certain pieces so well He's like yes, it's actually really impressive and like makes my mind like last day show me some stuff I'm like go can you teach this part so he's gonna come up and teach the next little portion this and I'll come back We kind of go back and forth But this is gonna help you guys figure out where you fit in the ecosystem like hey This is cool.
